zh.Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德萊頓 史克來芬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Hugford於1320年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德萊頓 史克來芬時，他的父親William De Hugford18歲，母親Mrs William De Hugford14歲。他於1344年與Alice Middleton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德萊頓 史克來芬結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Hugford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mogford
meanings: English: habitational name from Mogworthy in Rackenford (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Mogga + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Hugford was born in 1320, in Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Hugford, was 18 and his mother, Mrs William De Hugford, was 14. He married Alice Middleton in 1344, in Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Hugford est né en 1320, à Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Hugford, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs William De Hugford, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Alice Middleton en 1344, à Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

ja.Middleton Scriven, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアミッドレトン スクリベン
ja.lifeSummary: Walter Hugfordが1320年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアミッドレトン スクリベンで生まれた時，父William De Hugfordは18歳，母Mrs William De Hugfordは14歳であった。1344年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアミッドレトン スクリベンでAlice Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Hugford(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 미들레턴 스크라이븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Hugford(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William De Hugford(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 미들레턴 스크라이븐에서 Alice Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Hugford родился в 1320 г. в местности миддлетон скривен, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Hugford было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William De Hugford, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Middleton в 1344 г. в местности миддлетон скривен, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
